compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome is experiencing a catastrophic collapse of vegetative matter. The P3 Pothos (anchor) has undergone total senescence or removal. The P1, P2, and P4 specimens are no longer visible or have completely withered into the substrate.

inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss (White Rabbit anchor remains, but plant is absent)

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no visible foliage.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no visible foliage.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; host plant (Pothos) is absent.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no visible foliage.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated and devoid of active root systems.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments remain in the P3/P4 area; electronic component (header pin) observed in T-4/T-3, removed by T-2.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_T-4: Initial state shows minimal foliage; P3 anchor present.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-2: Gradual loss of remaining leaf structure; removal of foreign electronic debris.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_current: Total disappearance of all plant matter; transition to complete darkness/neglect.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered specimens have suffered total mortality or have been removed from the pots. The environment is now just a collection of empty containers and inert substrate.
anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments (likely soil amendment attempt).
Presence of electronic header pins (non-botanical debris).
Total loss of all biological specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image sequence. Initially, the biome contained minimal, struggling plant life. Over the course of the 5-day observation window, the specimens exhibited progressive postural collapse and eventual total disappearance. By the current state, the pots are entirely empty. The presence of non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronic pins) suggests an unstable environment. The biome is currently in a state of total systemic failure.
